$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

md.usage: Tablet layouts; switches topic lists and support grid from 1 column to 2 columns.

lg.usage: Desktop layouts; toggles the sidebar visibility from a slide-out drawer on mobile/tablet to a fixed left-side sidebar panel.

structure.appShell: Desktop: Left-side fixed/sticky sidebar (width w-60/w-[60px]) + main content panel on the right with a top sticky Header (h-14). Main panel body is scrollable. Mobile: Sticky top header with a hamburger toggle button; sidebar is hidden and slide-in as an overlay drawer.

grids.name: Support search portal topic grid
grids.usage: Use for primary dashboards card decks (e.g. topic cards, support links).

responsiveRules.name: Sidebar visibility toggle
responsiveRules.rule: At screen widths < 1024px (below lg breakpoint), the left sidebar is completely hidden (hidden) and replaced by an hamburger toggle menu in the header. Above 1024px, the sidebar is permanently visible.
